reforms.description: The government plans to consolidate agencies responsible for research and innovation policies to streamline efforts and improve the overall research environment in Greece.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Consolidating agencies is expected to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of research and innovation policies, thereby fostering a more conducive environment for innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is working on an economic recovery and reform programme covering four policy priorities.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to address the complexity and fragmentation of existing research and innovation policies, which is crucial for improving Greece's innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: The government plans to consolidate agencies responsible for research and innovation policies.

reforms.description: The government intends to simplify access to R&D grants and tax incentives to encourage innovative activities among firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying access to funding will lower barriers for firms to engage in R&D, thereby promoting innovation and enhancing productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to simplify access to R&D grants and tax incentives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is important as it directly addresses a significant hurdle for innovative firms, potentially leading to increased R&D activities and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Difficulties in obtaining public grants or subsidies are one of the most important hurdles for innovative activities reported by Greek firms.

reforms.description: The Greek government aims to streamline innovation policies and R&D tax incentives to improve the business environment and raise public administration effectiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving innovation policies and R&D tax incentives is expected to enhance the business environment, thereby encouraging investment and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is focused on modernising the public administration and improving regulatory quality, including innovation policies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it targets the improvement of the overall innovation framework, which is crucial for economic recovery and growth.
reforms.source_quote: This requires: modernising the public administration; improving regulatory quality and further promoting competition; streamlining innovation policies and R&D tax incentives.

reforms.description: Greece is streamlining its complex institutional framework for research and innovation policies to enhance R&D effectiveness. The National Strategic Plan for Research and Development and the National Research and Innovation Strategy for Smart Specialization aim to address fragmentation and improve coordination among agencies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving coordination and reducing duplication in R&D policies can enhance the effectiveness of public funding and foster innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan aims to tackle the challenges of fragmentation and complexity in the R&D institutional framework.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses systemic issues in the R&D framework, which could lead to significant improvements in the efficiency of research funding and innovation outcomes.
reforms.source_quote: Streamlining the complex institutional framework of Greece’s research and innovation policies will contribute to boosting R&D.

reforms.description: Greece plans to progressively boost R&D spending by 0.25% of GDP through public incentives, aiming to enhance innovation and productivity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to enhance innovation capabilities, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform is part of a recommended package to boost investment in infrastructure and knowledge.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in public investment in R&D, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Through public incentives, progressively boost R&D spending by 0.25% of GDP.

reforms.description: Greece aims to increase its gross expenditure on R&D to 1.2% of GDP by 2020, supported by EU funds and policy changes that have already led to a 50% increase in R&D spending since 2012.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding is expected to enhance productivity and innovation, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Gross expenditure on R&D has been increasing, reaching 1.18% of GDP in 2018.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing R&D funding, which is crucial for improving Greece's innovation capacity and productivity growth.
reforms.source_quote: In 2018, gross expenditure on R&D was 1.18% of GDP, not far from the 2020 target of 1.2% of GDP set in the National Growth Strategy.

reforms.description: Greece enhanced its R&D tax relief for enterprises by transitioning from an incremental scheme to a volumetric one, significantly increasing the generosity of the tax relief for both large firms and SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The increased generosity of R&D tax relief encourages more firms to invest in research and development, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The changes to the R&D tax relief have been noted as having increased the generosity of the support.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant improvement in the R&D tax incentive framework, which is crucial for enhancing private sector investment in innovation.
reforms.source_quote: In 2013, Greece enhanced the R&D tax relief it offers to enterprises by moving from an incremental scheme to a volumetric one.

reforms.description: The Greek government is considering the establishment of national or regional technology transfer offices to improve university-industry collaboration and enhance the management of intellectual property rights.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating better collaboration between universities and industry, this initiative aims to enhance the commercialization of research outputs, leading to increased innovation and economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government could consider the establishment of national or regional technology transfer offices.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant as it addresses a critical barrier to innovation by improving the transfer of knowledge from academia to industry.
reforms.source_quote: The Greek government could consider the establishment of national or regional technology transfer offices covering more universities.

reforms.description: Greece intends to establish technology transfer offices in universities to enhance collaboration between academia and industry.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the transfer of knowledge and technology from universities to the market, this reform can enhance innovation and economic development.
reforms.status_evidence: Establish technology transfer offices in universities to strengthen university-industry collaboration.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is important as it aims to bridge the gap between research and commercial application, which is vital for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Establish technology transfer offices in universities to strengthen university-industry collaboration.

reforms.description: Greece's 2020 budget introduces a lower labour income tax band for annual incomes below EUR 10,000, reducing the rate from 22% to 9%, alongside a reduction in social insurance contribution rates by 5.0 percentage points by 2023.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the tax burden on low-income earners, the reform aims to increase disposable income, thereby encouraging employment and formalization of the labor market.
reforms.status_evidence: The budget and earlier legislation have been enacted to reduce the tax and contribution wedge.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the tax system aimed at improving labor market outcomes and reducing informality, which is crucial for economic recovery.
reforms.source_quote: The budget introduces a lower labour income tax band for annual incomes below EUR 10,000 of 9%, compared with 22% previously.

reforms.description: Greece has merged 14 technical institutes with its 22 universities to create 25 tertiary education institutions, aiming to improve the quality and demand for vocational training by integrating technical and theoretical courses.
reforms.component_name: Merger of Technical Institutes and Universities
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing vocational training and aligning it with academic programs, the reform is expected to improve employability and skill levels in the workforce, thus supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government halted this reform for the 2019-2020 academic year as it embarked on a review of the vocational education and training framework.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the education system, aiming to enhance the integration of vocational and academic training, which is crucial for addressing skill mismatches in the labor market.
reforms.source_quote: In a significant reform to tertiary education, Greece has merged 14 technical institutes with its 22 universities to create 25 tertiary education institutions.

reforms.description: Greece's tertiary education institutions are gaining greater autonomy over their budgets, with funding now linked to objective criteria such as student numbers and research production, which is expected to enhance research and innovation performance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Linking funding to performance metrics incentivizes universities to improve their research output and align with labor market needs, potentially boosting innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The law passed in 2019 has been put into effect, granting universities budget autonomy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the funding model for higher education, aiming to enhance research capabilities and responsiveness to market needs.
reforms.source_quote: The consolidated universities are gaining autonomy over their budget, following a 2019 law.

reforms.description: Greece is piloting projects with the European Agenda for Adult Learning (ERASMUS+) to upgrade adult skill training, aiming to improve the quality and relevance of training programs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing adult skill training can improve workforce adaptability and productivity, which is crucial for economic recovery and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Greece is piloting projects under the ERASMUS+ framework to enhance adult training.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve adult education and training, which is essential for addressing skill gaps in the labor market.
reforms.source_quote: Greece is piloting projects with the European Agenda for Adult Learning (ERASMUS+) to upgrade adult skill training.
